title: goniolimon tataricum subsp. graecum
intro: Goniolimon tataricum subsp. graecum, also known as Greek statice, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Plumbaginaceae family and is native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Goniolimon tataricum subsp. graecum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health conditions. The plant can be prepared in various ways, such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, including skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory problems.
